summary: A clipped Fox Business segment in split-screen showing the anchor and a Washington correspondent reporting on Tom Homan meeting Minnesota leaders, with chyrons about honoring detainers and turning criminal aliens over to ICE. It is a raw cable-news broadcast clip with no music or stylized editing. Plain news footage, out of scope for youth-appeal produced content.
notable_text: FOX BUSINESS; TRUMP: FREY PLAYING W/ FIRE NOT ENFORCING FED LAW; HOMAN MEETS MN LEADERS TO "DE-ESCALATE" TENSIONS
